label: FACIS DSP — State Bootstrap & Persistence
info:
Owns the PVC-backed JSON state files for transfers and negotiations.

Startup: read /data/dsp-state/transfers.json and /data/dsp-state/negotiations.json
into flow context. On read failure (first boot), initialise empty maps.

Mutations on other tabs use `flow.set('transfers'|'negotiations', ...)` synchronously,
then fire the `dsp.persist.transfers` or `dsp.persist.negotiations` link with an empty
trigger. The receiver re-serialises the latest snapshot to disk (overwrite mode).

Single-replica only — file-based state is not multi-replica safe.
When Postgres backing is added (out of scope), this tab is replaced wholesale.

name: restore transfers context
init empty transfers
restore negotiations context
init empty negotiations
serialise transfers
serialise negotiations
